text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're in the quiet lull after a major race when summer rolls around.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Time... off?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. I think it'd be good for you to rest and
refresh!

Yeah. I think it'd be good for you to rest and
refresh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see now. This is all part of your plan for my growth. In that case, I
will put my full heart and soul into relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just for a few days, and she's still got class like normal, but I'm
hoping this'll give her some extra time to have fun and unwind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then, the very next day, when I pass the track on the way back to
my room...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Whew. That was a fruitful session.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! Um, this is... How should I put it?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer. I understand that I'm supposed to be relaxing, but I
just couldn't bring myself to without practicing first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Yaeno's directness is one of her best traits, but this isn't the time for
it. She needs a breather!
choice_data_list: No more training during break, okay?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm sorry to have concerned you. I'm embarrassed by the lack of
restraint I've displayed...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I swear to use this mistake as a learning experience. I'll get changed
and return to the dorm at once. Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as she heads away, but I can't help but wonder if Yaeno really
understood the part about not training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's not here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not here either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And... no Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given her reaction yesterday, I end up doing a sweep of the various
training facilities around campus, just to be sure Yaeno's relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see her, so she must've gone back to her room after class, or
maybe she went out with friends. Either way, she doesn't appear to be
training, so I head out to get some shopping done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home, I decide to swing by the riverbank. It's kind of
become a special place for me, what with the time we've spent here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hup! ...Hah! ...Sei! ...Tah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day I met Yaeno, she was here training. I was completely awed by
her beautiful martial forms as I watched, frozen in place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her voice sounded so focused. Heh, I can almost hear...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Wh-what a coincidence. Are you also out for a walk?
choice_data_list: ...You were training just now, weren't you?
...You were training just now, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I came off campus so I wouldn't be tempted by any of the training
facilities, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I caught sight of this spot under the bridge, nostalgia and
motivation overwhelmed me... And I unthinkingly disobeyed your
directions. I am terribly, terribly sorry!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I don't know how to explain it, but it feels impossible to restrain myself from training. Whenever I laze around, I get this sense that I should be training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks genuinely upset... I'm not entirely sure if it's because she
wants to train, feels guilty about not resting, or both... But either
way—
choice_data_list: All right. Let's do some fitness training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
B-But you said that I need to spend time resting to replenish my
strength.
choice_data_list: I know, but I don't want to restrict you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...!
Osu! I'll continue where I left off, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, we exercise until sunset. It seems like giving Yaeno breaks
isn't as easy as I thought...
